PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-05-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Monica Castro, via Zoom, for Silke Finnis, Personal Representative.

The court confirms with counsel that minors' trusts have been created and funded via a settlement agreement and confirms that the trusts do not have case numbers and thus are currently not under court supervision. The court advises counsel that petitions should be filed for the trusts to obtain case numbers. The court also confirms with counsel that a series of accountings will be required, beginning with an accounting to cover from the date of death, Feb-11-2016 to Feb-28-2018. Counsel advises how the trusts will be funded. The court confirms that it will be taking today's matter off calendar. The court advises that it is concerned about protecting the minor's interests and will be setting a status thereon.

After additional discussion, the Status Petition is taken off calendar. A Status of Accounting is set for Sep-20-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status of Guardianships is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Prado. Not Reported.

Appearances: Monica Castro, via Zoom, for Silke Finis, Executor.

Counsel reports that the ongoing related civil matter remains unresolved which has caused the delay in resolving this matter. Counsel is instructed to deliver courtesy copies of the status petition, proof of service, and proposed order to the court, in short order. The court confirms with counsel that Walter Finis is alive and lives in Germany. The court advises counsel that he will either need to be formally notified or file his waiver of notice if applicable. The court and counsel discuss the issue of a guardianship of the estate for the minor children and counsel advises that since the minors live with their mother a guardianship of the estate should not be required and advises that the preceding was one of the terms of a court approved settlement. The court advises counsel that it will contemplate the issue regarding the minors, and the issue may be addressed at the next calling of this matter.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Jul-05-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.
